meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template Tutorial
content.seo_description: Overcome project stagnation with the Antigravity template. Learn to leverage AI-driven workflows and Claude Code to ship premium software faster for clients.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template provides a production-ready foundation that eliminates 'blank page syndrome.' By integrating modular architecture with Claude Code, you can instantly scaffold complex features, maintain architectural integrity, and deliver high-value client projects in a fraction of the time, turning creative drought into a scalable, repeatable development machine.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank terminal, the cursor blinking with mocking rhythmic precision. Your client is waiting, the deadline is encroaching, and your creative engine has stalled. The 'no project ideas' trap isn't a lack of talent; it's a failure of framework. You need a system that does the heavy lifting while you focus on the business logic that actually pays the bills.

Enter the Antigravity project template—a high-velocity scaffold designed for engineers who value speed without sacrificing enterprise standards. By coupling this with Claude Code, you transform from a manual coder into a lead architect, orchestrating complex deployments with precision. Stop guessing what to build next and start executing on a battle-tested blueprint that guarantees consistent, professional results.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish the core directory structure to ensure modularity and separation of concerns from the start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity standard layout including /src, /tests, and /config directories. Setup environment variables for a scalable SaaS architecture.

steps.title: Define the Business Logic Schema
steps.description: Use the template's built-in schema manager to define data models that satisfy complex client requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with user roles, subscription tiers, and audit logging support.

steps.title: Automate Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to inject specific feature modules into the Antigravity structure without breaking the existing architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an authentication module using the Antigravity pattern, integrating JWT and OAuth2 provider support.

steps.title: Implement High-Performance Middleware
steps.description: Apply standard middleware to handle rate limiting and logging, ensuring the project is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement production-grade middleware for rate-limiting and request logging within the Antigravity router.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file middleware.ts --task 'add production security headers'

steps.title: Run Integration and Load Tests
steps.description: Validate the entire stack using automated testing scripts provided by the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the automated test suite to run integration tests against the new API endpoints.

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag in Claude Code to review architectural changes before committing to the file system.
Map your client's specific requirements to Antigravity's 'Service Layer' to maintain clean controller code.
Keep your 'antigravity_prompt' library in a Notion doc for instant reuse across different client projects.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store common project constraints, preventing repetitive prompt engineering.
Inject 'feature flags' early into the template to allow for rapid A/B testing for your clients.
resources: Best Practices for SaaS Architecture: https://architect.guide
content.next_steps: Once your foundation is set, deploy to a staging environment using your provider of choice and run a smoke test. Then, begin iterative feature development by feeding client feedback directly into your Claude Code workflow.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt and creative blocks dictate your output. By mastering the Antigravity template, you reclaim your billable hours and build products that stand the test of time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
